introSection:
Roller Coster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Helensburgh Pier Family Amusement Park in Helensburgh, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, UK. It was owned by the Codona family.

In the past, the ride had a canvas tunnel which read "Douglas Codona". The front of the ride had "Helensburgh Pier Roller Coster" printed on it.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a Wacky Worm clone.

fullText:
Roller Coster was a steel kiddie roller coaster previously located at Helensburgh Pier Family Amusement Park in Helensburgh, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, UK. It was owned by the Codona family.

In the past, the ride had a canvas tunnel which read "Douglas Codona". The front of the ride had "Helensburgh Pier Roller Coster" printed on it.

The ride is a Wacky Worm clone.
